title: nephrodium odontoloma
intro: Nephrodium odontoloma, also known as the tooth fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaves and rhizomes. The health benefits of Nephrodium odontoloma include the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as the reduction of pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically to aid in the healing process of wounds and injuries.
